title: RSA Encryption, Signatures, and Safe Migration · Failure Repair Bay
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible RSA-OAEP and RSA-PSS boundary adapter with one primitive, parameter, nonce, context, key, parser, trust, timing, migration, or recovery defect; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in RSA-OAEP and RSA-PSS boundary adapter and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Generate or parse supported RSA keys with minimum strength, valid public exponent, purpose, provenance, and bounded encodings.
Use RSA-OAEP only for bounded key material with matching hash and label context and uniform decryption failure.
Hash exact canonical bytes and use RSA-PSS with explicit hash and salt policy for new RSA signatures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration
steps.instruction:
Order the Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration Cryptography and Go threat-to-evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Cryptography and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration, keep Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration connected to executable Go behavior evidence.

content.text: A debug cryptographic engineering team handles case 6918 during a replicated device restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate RSA on trusted keys, OAEP or PSS purpose, payload limits, and uniform failure; preserve accessible status, non-color meaning, keyboard operation, error recovery, and secret-safe diagnostics; then change one authenticated byte and prove clean rejection without partial effect. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Inventory RSA uses, migrate by purpose to modern approved alternatives, retain verified old-read windows, and remove obsolete private keys.

content.text: Order work so Crypto Go Rsa Agility Migration has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.
